# Agent Lee

An AI co-pilot built into the Cloudflare dashboard that helps you navigate, configure, and take actions on Cloudflare services

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/agent-lee/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).
>
> Use [Agent Lee llms-full.txt](https://developers.cloudflare.com/agent-lee/llms-full.txt) for the complete Agent Lee documentation in a single file, intended for offline indexing, bulk vectorization, or large-context models.

## Agent Lee documentation pages

- [Agent Lee](https://developers.cloudflare.com/agent-lee/index.md): Ask questions, run diagnostics, and take actions across your Cloudflare account using an AI-powered dashboard assistant.
